title: lepidagathis boholensis
intro: Lepidagathis boholensis, also known as the Bohol lepidagathis or Bohol blue glory bower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lepidagathis boholensis include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory infections, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
